violations.text: Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of pink, brown, and black residues. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice machine was turned off to be properly cleaned and sanitized. New Violation. Correct By: 08/28/2025
Spray bottle used for storing chemicals taken from bulk supplies was not marked with the common name of the chemical. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/28/2025
Scoop observed stored in stagnant water between uses. Utensils must be stored in/on a clean, dry location. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/28/2025

The cutting board of the small prep unit is very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 09/12/2025

The ceiling in the kitchen is covered with tiles that are not smooth, durable, and easily cleanable. The tiles are heavily stained and unable to be properly cleaned. Ceiling tiles are to be replaced with tiles that are smooth, durable, and easily cleanable. New Violation. Correct By: 10/31/2025

Shellstock (clams) located in the walk-in cooler did not have the proper identification tags. Shellstock tags must remain attached to the container in which the shellstock are received until the container is empty. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/30/2024

Shellfish tags must be maintained for 90 days in chronological order and the date when the last shellfish was used from the bag must be noted on the shellfish tag. New Violation. Correct By: 07/30/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (slicer, ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of residue, food, and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice machine turned off to be cleaned and sanitized. Slicer was taken apart and cleaned and sanitized during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/30/2024

The door to the outside, located at the front entrance, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 08/06/2024
Can opener and blade observed to be rusted and must be replaced to prevent contamination. New Violation. Correct By: 08/13/2024

Refrigerator door gaskets of the prep units were observed in poor repair. In addition, prep unit #2 on the cook/grill line is missing a handle. Gaskets and handle must be replaced. New Violation. Correct By: 08/13/2024
